results.title: Loova AI: Your AI Creative Studio
results.content:
That frustration is what led us to build Loova Agents.

We wanted to create something that behaves more like a creative director than just another AI generator.   
With Loova Agents, the goal is simple:

understand the intent behind your idea

plan scenes before generation

generate visuals and BGM together

keep the whole project inside one infinite canvas

let creators shape stories visually, not tab by tab

People are already using it for product ads, AI short films, talking avatar videos, UGC style content, and more.

We’re still very early. Still learning every day. Still building with the community.

If you try it, I’d genuinely love to hear your thoughts. A lot of what we build next will come directly from user feedback. Here is a quick link to explore: 

SomitraSR from Timidlly [...] Anbang Xu
Loova AI

Loova AI

@rockzhang Yes, that’s exactly what we’re building. The goal is for the agent to act like a director and marketing expert, helping you turn a rough idea into a high-quality video quickly and easily.

Milo
Loova AI

Loova AI

@rockzhang That’s exactly what we want to make easier.

You shouldn’t need to know how to write a script, plan shots, or choose the right tools. With Loova, you can start from a rough creative goal, and the agent will turn it into a story structure, scenes, visuals, and a video workflow automatically.

You can still jump in and adjust things, but the heavy lifting should be handled by the agent. [...] Loova AI

Hi everyone, this is Anbang, founder of Loova 👋

Before building Loova Agents, I kept running into the same issue over and over again.

AI video creation is powerful now. But the workflow still feels broken.

People open 20 different tabs just to make one video.

Docs for ideas. GPT for scripts. One tool for images. Another for video. Another for music. Then editing software on top of that.

You go from:  
idea → prompts → images → video → editing

And somewhere in the middle, the creative flow gets lost.

The bigger problem is that most AI tools only help you generate.  
They don’t help you think visually.  
They don’t help you direct.

But most creators are not trained filmmakers. They shouldn’t need to think like prompt engineers just to tell a story.

results.title: JoggAI Reviews (2026)
results.content:
#### What needs improvement

censorship (2)bait and switch (2)

Report

 55 views

Constance Tong

Loova AI

Loova AI

Hi Tony, we’re sorry it feels like the goalposts have been moved. Let me clarify exactly what was included in the original AppSumo deal and how things stand today.

What the deal covered

● Unlimited lip-sync videos with the “classic” avatar pipeline (now called AvatarLite).

● A fixed allotment of Non-Video Credits (now called Motion Credits), designed for premium animation features.

Why Veo 3 is BYOK [...] JoggAI is one of those tools that makes you go, “Wait… how is this even possible?” It’s like having your own video production crew powered by AI — minus the overhead, cameras, and endless editing. 🎥 What I Love About It 1. AI Avatars That Actually Feel Human The avatars are realistic, the lip-sync is surprisingly on point, and the ability to create a custom avatar with your own voice and face? Huge plus. It really brings a personal touch to otherwise static content. 2. Text‑to‑Video, URL‑to‑Video — It’s Just Smart You drop in a script or even just a product URL, and boom — JoggAI builds the video. Voiceover, visuals, captions, all done. It’s not just a time-saver — it’s a creative amplifier. 3. Batch Creation = A/B Testing Gold If you’re running campaigns and want 10, 50, or 100 [...] Jogg will help you make great videos fast. You don’t need to film or edit. Just simply type or upload a photo or paste a product link, and it will turn your idea into a video within minutes. I tried it and liked how quick and simple it was. What it can do- Lifelike avatars: Create a natural-looking human from text or a photo. Text-to-video and photo-to-avatar: Make full videos from words or pictures. Product videos from a link: Turn a product page into an ad video fast. Best for ecommerce store owners. Talking photos and podcast videos: Make still pictures move and show audio with visuals. Good lip-sync and many voices: Mouths match speech well, and there are lots of voice choices. Batch tools and auto-captions: Multiple videos at once and add captions automatically. Templates and avatar
